column2: ylab("IgA") + xlab(" IgG") + ggtitle("Correlation of IgA and IgG") +
ylab("IgA") + xlab(" IgG") + ggtitle("Correlation of IgA and IgG") +
pval_pearson_subsetIgA = with((data %>% filter(IgATiter>7.5)), cor.test(log2(IgATiter), log2(IgGTiter))) # parametric
pval_wilcox_subsetIgA = with((data %>% filter(IgATiter>7.5)), wilcox.test(IgATiter, IgGTiter)) # non-parametric
